programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is scheduled to play the drums in his first music school recital. Although his parents and the Mertzes are overcome with nervousness, Little Ricky seems calm until his big moment arrives, then goes to pieces.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.desc: The 60's were coming-of-age years for The Rolling Stones. From the pubs of London to the concert halls of America, the 60s watched the Stones grow from a cover band to a powerhouse of rock!

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: The 70's were a decade of extremes for The Stones. They rose to the height of their collective creative prowess, spun downward under stardom's weight, then climbed up again.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: It was during the 1990's that The Rolling Stones proved once and for all that rock and roll has no boundaries or age limits. They'd surge with fresh wind in their sails and new lands in their sights.

programme.desc: The queens get physical in the 69th International Draglympics. Choreographer Travis Wall and Olympian figure skaters Mirai Nagasu and Adam Rippon guest judge. Camp aerobicise queen Love Connie makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens use organic ingredients to create sickening but sustainable high fashion looks. Supermodel Amber Valletta and reality star Kandi Burruss guest judge. Drag queen Alyssa Edwards makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Sukihana goes under the knife as Kill Bill charts a path of his own. Ray J. makes a sexy video with Florence, who gets a nasty surprise from Marlon. Shay and her mom reach a breaking point. Amara and Jullian come face to face.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Sukihana's engagement party ends in disaster. Iyanla Vanzant arrives in Miami on a special assignment. Amara and Shay settle their score. Florence comes clean to her family. Bobby blows up on Trick Daddy. Ray J and Princess face the end of their marriage.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Mimi's new relationship has everyone in Atlanta buzzing. Momma Dee snuffs out treason after Rasheeda and Kirk leave Scrappy high and dry. New on the scene, the King family has everyone on edge, as Tiara and Tommie compete to be Scrapp DeLeon's queen.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Chaos ensues between Tommie and Tiarra at Mimi's party. Tiarra confronts Scrapp with an ultimatum. Tammy discovers some surprising news about a new model that she wants to hire. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tammy's luncheon with D.Smith and Betty turns left. Stevie J is back from his Hollywood adventures in LA. Waka Flocka returns to the ATL for an event. Scrapp sets up a meeting with Tiarra and Tommie.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Joseline returns to Atlanta with a vengeance. Scrappy and Rasheeda hash out their issues. Karlie lets it all hang out with Lyfe Jennings. K.Michelle pops up, and Scrapp DeLeon pops off at KK over her relationship with Tiarra. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Joseline dishes on Karlie Redd, Stevie J and KK. Kirk's daughter asks for help with her music career. Tommie's suspicions about Scrapp come to a fever pitch, and Mimi agonizes over Stevie J and Chris meeting for the first time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: A surprise guest at Joseline's party leaves everyone at odds. Scrappy discovers Bambi's extracurricular activities. The King Family is divided over loss. Deb Antney makes Momma Dee and Shirleen squash their beef once and for all. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie cozies up to a new man. Stevie J threatens to sever ties with Joseline and turns to an old friend for support. K.Michelle is back in town. Mimi and Chris hit a crossroad. Jessica Dime fans the flames between Bambi and Scrappy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Scrapp DeLeon receives devastating legal news. K.Michelle's party brings her toe to toe with D. Smith and Betty Idol. Jessica Dime takes her relationship with Scrappy to the next level. Tiarra and KK try to find common ground. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Dime goes on a date with Scrappy but she's in for a surprise. Tommie discovers a hotel receipt in Scrapp's car with Karlie's name on it. Joseline turns to Mimi for help, and Mimi learns that Stevie is hiding secrets. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Deb's panel discussion on bullying has a surprising outcome. D. Smith helps Ariane find her voice. Scrapp has an emotional goodbye with his son, King, and spends his final night of freedom with his family. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Scrapp faces his sentencing as those that love him reflect on their future. Mimi and Stevie take a road trip to uncover the truth. Joseline makes a big confession. And D. Smith and Scrappy face-off after his insensitive social media post.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tammy faces the truth when Waka's indiscretions hit the blogs. While Joseline defends the legitimacy of her marriage, Stevie decides to work with one of her rivals. J-Nicks and Tiarra decide to take their relationship to the next level. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In South Africa's Greater Kruger Park, a lion cub finds her place in the wild under the guidance of a devoted father, a fierce mother and a playful sister.

programme.title: Dark Side of Crocs
programme.desc: The story of some of the most impressive creatures in the world, two Nile crocodiles, living together in the African river.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: In the Okavango Delta, the desert sun battles with floodwaters; every animal, whether termite queen or elephant bull, must cope with the never-ending changes.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Explore Kui Buri National Park, a Southeast Asian haven where elephants, gaurs, and vibrant wildlife thrive thanks to ingenious conservation efforts.

programme.title: Wonders of Nature
programme.desc: The animal families in Serengeti stick together, share food, and play around in the grasslands. The young ones get acquainted with the ways of the wild.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: In Samburu, matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up; cheetah mom Kuleta evades a crafty pack of hyenas in Naboisho; checking in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter in Laikipia.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: The sun rises on a day in May and the animals of the American tropics get ready to beat the heat.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Old friends and a breakaway Manzi trio; Kakumbi make a kill.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on Argentina's dangerous Atlantic coastline, where orcas hunt young sea lions and penguins use clever tricks to protect their offspring.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: A variety of insects make Australia's forests their home.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A look at how Madagascar's species have evolved to exploit their various habitats.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: In his first at-bat at Angel Stadium, Shohei Ohtani hits his first MLB home run.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Josh Beckett throws a complete game shutout to help the Marlins win their second championship.

programme.title: MLB Docs
programme.desc: Hall of Famers Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner reflect on their induction and careers.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Armando Galarraga comes one out shy of a perfect game after a missed call at first base.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Roy Halladay tosses a perfect game against the Marlins, the 20th perfect game in MLB history.

programme.title: MLB

programme.title: World Series Film

programme.desc: While trying to resolve a quarrel between warring brothers Eteocles and Polynices, Hercules is taken captive by Queen Omphale of Lydia.

programme.desc: Martians abduct Santa Claus and two human children in hopes of bringing Christmas to their planet.

programme.desc: Our intrepid hosts are trapped between Isaac Asimov's Literary Doomsday Device and Robert Ito from Quincy M.E. (1976) in a fur caveman outfit.

programme.title: MST3K: Hobgoblins

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A man learns he was born with special powers and becomes the superhero Puma Man. He fights the villainous Dr. Kobras, who uses an ancient mind-control mask in his attempts to rule the world.

programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion (1957) while the Bots throw a party for Joel.

programme.desc: Kristin gets her first taste of being in a relationship with Justin when he doesn't show at Brody's surprise party. Heidi and Spencer disagree about when to start a family, and Audrina goes on a date with Justin's best friend.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An 1861 Civil War saber finds its way into the shop--but if it's real, why was the blade never sharpened? Then Rick and the owner of a Chuck Berry autographed Fender guitar find themselves on different pages.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars reach for the sky when an 1890's Colt .45 "peacemaker" rides into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Joker's Big Score

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are picking their way through Florida when they get a lead on a potential gold mine -- a five-acre property that's an automotive graveyard.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys uncover a once-in-a-lifetime find, and must decide to go big or go home. Mike gets down-and-dirty to rescue an old piece from Mother Nature.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike's hurt his back but can't afford time off to recuperate. The guys dive into a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's unbelievable collection but make a huge mistake in the process.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank comb through a master collector's untouched outbuildings in North Carolina. After getting past a few petrified hams they find a true gem, a 1950 Studebaker that Mike falls in love with.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank get revved up about an awesome new client: North Carolina's NASCAR Hall of Fame. The curators have asked them to scour the country for relics that help tell the unique history of auto racing.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the guys find an old general store that had a lot of Hatfield customers around the time of the legendary feud between the Hatfields & McCoys. There are a few artifacts with the Hatfields name, but are they authentic?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys make a return visit to fan favorite Hobo Jack's sprawling forest sanctuary in Illinois. But wading through his "junkalanche" proves easier than making a deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get a call about a 1979 KISS pinball machine--can it still "Rock 'n Roll All Nite", or will it steal Corey's quarter and KISS the deal goodbye? Then Rick is stumped when a woman brings in a 1914 Star-note $20 bill.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Campaign Starting Now! / Arcade Iyami / Totoko and Nyaa 2

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Karamatsu and Brothers / New Employee Totoko / Mr. Dubbingmatsu
programme.desc: Karamatsu is flooded with requests for favors by his brothers, Totoko gets hired into Todomatsu's company, and the glory of a Mr. Osomatsu voice recording session is revealed.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Chibita's Revenge
programme.desc: For years the Matsuno boys have taken adavantage of Chibita, who has now reached a breaking point. On a dark and stormy night, the crazed oden chef begins hunting the sextuplets down one by identical one.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado
programme.desc: From the moment it debuted, Sharknado was one of the most requested titles in RiffTrax history. It makes Jaws IV look like Jaws III, and Jaws III look like Jaws. You won't want to miss the chance to see Mike, Kevin, Bill, tackle Sharknado, live!

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado 2
programme.desc: When you heard about the first Sharknado you thought, A movie about a tornado filled with sharks? It's too good to be true! But it was true; and then the next year when you heard they were making another you thought, It too is too good to be true!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fun in Balloon Land
programme.desc: We would say that Fun In Balloonland is our favorite RiffTrax movie, but there's just one problem: it's hard to really describe it as a movie. It is an event. To attempt to describe its plot to you, would be like attempting to divide by zero.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Octaman
programme.desc: Deep in the Mexican jungle, a legendary creature lurks in a swamp. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: At Your Fingertips: Floats (Live Edition)
programme.desc: This short instructs how to build a general TYPE of garbage-craft, a floating garbage craft, rather than focusing on utilizing a specific type of garbage to build a craft. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Prisoners of the Lost Universe
programme.desc: When a local TV host gets into a car accident with an electrician, she didn't count on one thing, that he would be the two time state champion who had also defended the interstate trophy in the ancient art of Kendo Swords. Because, would you?

programme.title: RiffTrax: Future Force
programme.desc: David Carradine in Future Force is what you'd get if Arnold substituted creatine with frosting, Stallone started cutting his own hair and Seagal...Well, Seagal wouldn't have to change much actually.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Future Zone
programme.desc: Mike, Kevin and Bill splashed a fresh coat o' mud onto their Chevy Blazer and made sure any and all gloves were firmly secured in an out-of-the-way box before hopping on the highway to the Future Zone!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On another one of their quests, SG-1 encounters a medieval civilization and frees a woman tied to a stake as a sacrifice to a demon. When the woman is freed, the demon vows to destroy the village unless the SG-1 team is offered up in appeasement.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 lands in the middle of a blazing battle between some Stargate soldiers and a Jaffa army. Believing the soldiers to be the missing-in-action SG-11 team, O'Neill and the others provide assistance… until the mystery team turns its weapons on SG-1!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue of captured Abydonians, Daniel finds his missing wife, Sha're. But instead of greeting him, she attacks him - leading to her death at the hands of Teal'c. Distraught over her death and angry at Teal'c, Daniel quits Stargate Command.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters an entire planet suffering from amnesia. The planet's leader, a woman named Ke'ra, returns to Earth with SG-1 to find a cure. But as Ke'ra and Daniel develop a mutual attraction, SG-1 suspects she may not be who she appears to be.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter's father has been captured on a moon transformed into hell. No one but Jolinar has ever escaped from hell, so Tok'ra technology is used to access Jolinar's memories from Carter's mind…but not before an old foe shows up to foil the mission!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lorne discovers a planet with dozens of satellites in orbit. However, inhabitants on this planet are no further advanced than the renaissance and have a flag with McKay's face. The team realize a game they had found earlier might be more than a game.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Investigating an abandoned space station, McKay mistakenly brings one of its scientists out of stasis. The scientist explains to the team that the base was the last effort by his people to avoid the repeated culling they've endured by the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With the entire city ordered to take a personal day the team does their best to unwind and enjoy their leisure time. Without warning a mysterious explosion rips through the city killing and injuring unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After helping relocate the Taranans, the Atlantis team realizes they haven't heard from the village in a long period of time. It appears the Taranans have just abandoned their village until McKay detects life signs well beneath the surface.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is shocked when a satellite housing a stargate takes up orbit above Atlantis. When the stargate begins transmitting an energy beam, attacking the city, McKay takes a page from the Ancients and opts to sink Atlantis back into the ocean.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones ponen una bomba en la hacienda Reyes pero se equivocan de carro, Franco descubre que fue un atentado en su contra. Martín aconseja a Sara y confronta a Gabriela y a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula continúan sufriendo en silencio por no estar juntos. Julieta alucina con que tuvo intimidad con Juan. Ella, preocupada, acude al médico para recibir los resultados de sus exámenes. Gaspar se disculpa con Lupe quien condiciona su regreso.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Un hombre se presenta como esposo de Paula y revela verdades desconocidas, esta noticia le da una vuelta a la relación con Juan. Julieta esconde su enfermedad. Beatriz y Guadalupe cosechan éxitos como cantantes.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le pide a Paula que se vaya de la hacienda, pero ella se niega a irse. Esteban provoca a Juan y este reacciona con violencia, ya que no logra controlar sus celos. A Julieta se le intensifica su dolor de cabeza y sigue con su camino lleno de venganzas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula confiesa su amor a Juan, pero él le pide renunciar al dinero y a Esteban, como una prueba de lealtad. Ella no puede cumplirle, decide empacar y marcharse lejos. Julieta recibe el terrible diagnóstico y lo mantiene en secreto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta en un sanatorio, los empleados de los Reyes reportan normalidad en la hacienda Elizondo; sin embargo, las hermanas deciden comprobar por sus propios medios lo que sucede.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: El administrador del sanatorio descubre quién es Martín y lo manipula para que no diga nada, Hortencia se interesa en él. Sarita, Ruth y Antonio vigilan el rancho Elizondo por las noches.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario visita el rancho Elizondo con el pretexto de saludar a Gabriela y a Martín, pero Armando le prohíbe que regrese allí. Fernando siente que la situación se le va de las manos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: El doctor Bustillo visita a su primo, le confiesa que descubrió que el paciente es su suegro y le pide el doble de dinero, pero lo que gana es una golpiza por parte de los hombres de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia escucha cuando Bustillo menciona que tiene que matar al viejo, ella le dice a Martín que no tome ninguna pastilla que le den. Los Reyes y las Elizondo subastan las joyas de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel le aclara a Benito que toda la herencia va a ser para Ruth, aunque estén molestas y tengan diferentes opiniones sobre los Reyes. Fernando piensa en otras formas de presionar a Gabriela.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams soar to new heights over Southern California, competing in the final leg for a shot at the million-dollar prize and, for two teams, the chance to become the first ever all-female team to win the series.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven former Teams who fell short of winning the $1 million prize during their first Race around the globe will return for another shot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by a swarming sea of people on the congested streets of India, one team narrowly dodges a traffic collision while another's clumsiness threatens to spoil their chances of acing the Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the crowded streets of India, one team makes a costly blunder while another Racer takes a desperate plunge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Confronted by a psychological Detour, teams try to avoid making a Freudian slip in the slick streets of Austria, and a hefty meal proves to be too big for some teams' stomachs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy refuses to join an exclusive club when Barney's bid for membership is turned down.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rather than eat Aunt Bee's indigestible homemade pickles, Andy and Barney secretly substitute store-bought pickles in her preserving jars.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A trial run as Sheriff of Mayberry convinces Barney that he is not quite ready to take over a similar job in a neighboring town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy dissuades a visiting farmer from marrying Barney's girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie keeps a secret club oath even in the face of the serious accusation of burning down a barn.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches a wealthy young man the satisfaction of self-reliance.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The men of Mayberry, after a slow start, accept the addition of a lovely manicurist to Floyd's barbershop.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Mayberry resident is convinced that he is a jinx until Andy helps restore his selfconfidence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol maps a path toward Daryl that forces her to confront her past; Daryl, Isabelle, and Laurent struggle to define their roles at the Nest, under the watchful supervision of Losang; Daryl and Nesters launch a rescue mission for Fallou and Emile.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol and Ash take an unexpected detour during their journey to find Daryl; Daryl, Isabelle, and Sylvie uncover a dark new threat at the Nest. Losang's faith is tested.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol's hunt for information leads her to dangerous places and a new set of horrors; Daryl, Isabelle, and Fallou race to save one of their own; Pouvoir regroups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Pouvoir attacks the Nest and Losang and Isabelle confront each other.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Old friends and enemies realign in surprising ways as a new faction of survivors from the Nest and Pouvoir hunt down Laurent; Daryl struggles to forgive himself and Carol's lies come to a head.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: An exit strategy is charted from France; the Rooftop Community helps map a new plan for the future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: A chance encounter provides a potential way home; Daryl makes a tough decision.

programme.title: Ride With Norman Reedus

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl lidera un equipo de misión para buscar en la base militar que descubrió. Por su parte, Maggie cuenta su historia, lo que impulsa una nueva misión de supervivencia que solo Negan puede liderar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La misión de Maggie lleva al equipo a través de un túnel del metro plagado de zombis y con el problema añadido de Negan. En el grupo de Eugene, Yumiko busca respuestas acerca de su hermano.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers aprovechan que el equipo de la misión de Maggie se ha separado para atacarlos. Carol, Rosita, Magna y Kelly intentan capturar caballos para llevarlos a Alexandria. Judith, RJ, Hershel y Gracie asimilan que sus padres están lejos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Dog son capturados por los Reapers. Luego son llevados al Meridiano y se vuelven a conectar con una figura familiar de su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron, Carol, Lydia y Jerry van a las ruinas de Hilltop en busca de herramientas. El grupo de Eugene se somete a la orientación del Commonwealth. Maggie y Negan atraviesan el bosque. Judith y el resto de niños se enfrentan a los adolescentes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Connie y Virgil se esconden en una casa ocupada por misteriosas criaturas, en su afan de escaparse de los caminantes. Pope pone a prueba la lealtad de Daryl hacia los Reapers con una misión controvertida. Kelly deja Alexandria para buscar a Connie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie y Elijah aprenden nuevas tácticas de supervivencia de Negan. El grupo de Eugene quitan a los caminantes para pagar sus multas. Yumiko hace una entrevista para un trabajo importante. Daryl descubre más sobre Leah.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers defienden Meridian del asalto de una horda de zombis. Pope cree que Maggie es la responsable del ataque, y los habitantes de Alexandria tratan de proteger las defensas de la ciudad, destrozadas por una violenta tormenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo celebra Halloween en el interior de la Mancomunidad. Daryl y Rosita se someten a un entrenamiento militar dirigido por Mercer, mientras Carol investiga el problema de salud de Ezekiel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In the premiere of the 15th season, Tom replaces sash balancers on an antique window. Roger and Kevin check out the benefits of a robotic lawnmower. And Richard talks about treating water with lead.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Chicago to explore the dangers of home fires and ways to stay safe. Scott shows off a portable generator that doesn’t run on gas. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Richard finds a rusted sink strainer in the kitchen.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin use store-bought stair treads to create a bookshelf in Build It. And landscape designer Jenn Nawada transforms the look of a home’s foundation by using existing plants.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps plant a home orchard using apple and pear trees. Tom shows Kevin how to choose and use a circular saw. Richard installs a new tank water heater and discusses new regulations on them.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs a broken board on a front porch. Richard analyzes a homeowner’s green-stained shower. Scott brings more power to a bedroom and is able to conceal the wiring with crown molding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about a way to heat and cool a house using a new room-by-room ventilation system. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Tom explains the best ways to patch a small hole in the wall.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross Trethewey helps build a robotic wall that could be the key to tight spaces in urban living. Tom and Kevin use reclaimed pine heart wood to create a bench with a historic theme in Build It.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard travels to Seattle to help a couple choose and install laundry appliances. Tom shows Kevin new table saw technology. And Scott repairs a three-way switch.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger rips up an old, dangerous walkway to replace it with bluestone. Scott explains the best wire nuts to use for each project. Kevin gets a lesson on making mead.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Rafael Ruelas
programme.desc: On May 6th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought Rafael Ruelas for IBF and WBO World Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. The 12 round bout only went two rounds ending in technical knockout favoring De La Hoya.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Masayoshi Nakatani
programme.desc: On June 26th, 2021 Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Masayoshi Nakatani with Nakatani going down once in round 5 securing the win for Loma by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs David Diaz
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao and David Diaz fought eachother at Mandalay Bay Events Center in Las Vegas for the WBC World Lightweight titles with Diaz going down in the ninth round Pacquiao secured his victory.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Henry Tillman
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 Mike Tyson defeated Henry Tillman at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a bout supposed to last ten rounds but ended after one in a quick win for Tyson.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Lorenzo Canady
programme.desc: On August 15th, 1985 Mike Tyson and Lorenzo Canady fought eachother at Resorts International in Atlantic City that resulted in Tyson defeating Canady in the first round by Knockout.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn
programme.desc: On May 10th, 1991 James Toney fought Michael Nunn at the John O'Donnell Stadium in Davenport for IBF World middleweight titles with the bout ending in round 11 by technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 13th, 1993 James Toney faced Iran Barkley in a thrilling bout at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for IBF World Super middleweight title with Toney securing the title and victory.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER, a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix assuming that whomever winswillbe crowned the literal "ruler of the roads."

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Animated

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: iCarly
